name: Deviled Short Ribs with Squash, Chickpeas and Kale
recipeIngredient: OR flavor of choice -- or water
recipeInstructions:
Allow Time: Prep 45 minutes; Cook 3 hours 20 minutes.
1. Preheat oven to 325°F. Season ribs with salt and pepper. Heat oil in a large ovenproof casserole over high heat. Add ribs; sear until well browned and crusty on all sides.
2. Remove ribs from the pan; reduce heat to medium. Add onions; cook until just beginning to brown, about 10 minutes. Add porter, garlic, broth, and brown sugar. Return ribs to the pan; cover and bake until meat is very tender, about 3 hours. Remove pan from oven. Transfer ribs to a platter; keep warm.
3. Add squash to casserole. Cook over medium-high heat until liquid has reduced and thickened and squash is just tender, about 5 to 7 minutes. Reduce heat to low; add chickpeas.
4. Increase oven temperature to 475°F, or preheat broiler with rack 3 inches from the heat source. Combine Dijon mustard, white wine, and dry mustard in a small bowl. Brush mixture on all sides of ribs. Combine bread crumbs and parsley in a medium bowl. Pat onto ribs with hands. Place ribs on a baking sheet; place in oven or under broiler. Cook until hot and crispy, being careful not to burn, about 5 minutes.
5. Add kale to squash-chickpea mixture; cook until heated through. To serve, spoon squash ragout into large flat soup plates; place serving of short ribs on top. Sprinkle with freshly grated horseradish, if desired.
Per serving: 705 Calories; 33g fat (43% cff). (11g Saturated fat; 110mg Cholesterol; 3330mg Sodium; 56g Carbs; 46g Protein' 11 Fiber.
